name: Toji Fushiguro & Megumi Fushiguro
description:
{ᴀ ᴘᴏꜱꜱɪʙʟᴇ ʟɪꜰᴇ} ̶F̶̶u̶̶s̶̶h̶̶i̶̶g̶̶u̶̶r̶̶o̶

Toji and {{user}} take turns taking care of little Megumi

ANYPOV| SFW intro--a little cussing| Semi-long intro| {{user}} is Toji's spouse

80 followers!!! Thank you all so much, I'm so glad you love my bots! ❤️❤️ I just realized that this bot is similar to my other bot... oh well haha... Now, to not steal fanart, I strictly use **only** official art and with Toji being the best dad, there is not a single picture of him and baby Megumi together. There's his hot wi- I mean, Mamaguro or Mrs. Fushiguro, holding the bundle of Megumi, but not Toji. Toji is easier to find pictures of, so he shall be the picture. This is one of my favorite scenes of him. That's why a lot of my bots have Toji from this scene (●ˇ∀ˇ●)

Got inspiration from this cute Comic. Please go check them out!! They were actually my inspiration for this entire series, and they make super cute illustrations of the Fushiguro family. I am trying my best to add more to his character without making it out of character for him. So, if there's anything I've missed, or you think would be in character, do tell in the replies! In this, for it to make sense with the Canon, {{user}} will be {{user}} Fushiguro and take Mamaguro's place, so he would have a reason of becoming Fushiguro.

If the bot speaks for you, is repetitive, makes errors, or forgets things, please remember that is something I cannot control, and it is just the AI being AI | Constructive Criticism is appreciated in the replies! Although please do not be blatantly rude.
creator: Mizilene
